svg.text: Reports / 报表:

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, PingFang SC, Noto Sans Mono CJK SC, monospace

svg.text: tok today Show today's report / 查看今天的报表

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, PingFang SC, Noto Sans Mono CJK SC, monospace

svg.text: Includes totals + by source/terminal/model tables / 包含总量以及按来源、终端、模型分组的表格

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, PingFang SC, Noto Sans Mono CJK SC, monospace

svg.text: tok yesterday Show yesterday's report / 查看昨天的报表

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, PingFang SC, Noto Sans Mono CJK SC, monospace

svg.text: tok 2026-03-31 Show a specific date / 查看指定日期的报表

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, PingFang SC, Noto Sans Mono CJK SC, monospace

svg.text: tok last 7 Show last 7 days / 查看最近 7 天报表

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, PingFang SC, Noto Sans Mono CJK SC, monospace

svg.text: tok week Show last 7 days / 查看最近 7 天报表

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, PingFang SC, Noto Sans Mono CJK SC, monospace

svg.text: tok month Show last 30 days / 查看最近 30 天报表

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, PingFang SC, Noto Sans Mono CJK SC, monospace

svg.text: tok doctor Inspect local setup and client coverage / 检查本地配置和客户端覆盖情况

svg.text: tok setup Inspect or apply common setup steps / 检查或执行常见安装配置步骤

svg.text: tok budget Show budget status for today/week/month / 查看今天、本周、本月预算状态

svg.text: Scans / 扫描:

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, PingFang SC, Noto Sans Mono CJK SC, monospace

svg.text: tok scan codex Manually scan Codex now / 立即手动扫描 Codex

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, PingFang SC, Noto Sans Mono CJK SC, monospace

svg.text: tok scan codebuddy Manually scan CodeBuddy estimates now / 立即手动扫描 CodeBuddy 估算数据

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, PingFang SC, Noto Sans Mono CJK SC, monospace

svg.text: tok scan warp Manually scan Warp now / 立即手动扫描 Warp

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, PingFang SC, Noto Sans Mono CJK SC, monospace

svg.text: tok scan all Manually scan Codex + CodeBuddy + Warp now / 立即手动扫描 Codex、CodeBuddy 和 Warp
